title: Stretch: Dependency Vulnerability Scan
description: Run pnpm audit on the government app. Quantify known vulnerabilities by severity. Feeds discovery write-up and professional engineering practices.

title: Stretch: Collab Server Memory Profiling
description: Measure memory growth under sustained WebSocket load. Open 20+ docs, hold connections for 10 min, track heap. In-memory Y.Doc map with no eviction is the known risk. Amplifies Categories 3+6.

title: Audit: Type Safety
description: Count: any, as, !, @ts-ignore. Check strict mode. Per-package breakdown. Top 5 files.
close_reason: Type safety audit complete: 551 violations (272 any, 257 as-casts, 22 non-null, 0 ts-ignore), per-package breakdown, top 5 files, strict mode gaps identified

title: Audit: DB Query Efficiency
description: log_statement=all. 5 flows. Query counts. EXPLAIN ANALYZE. N+1. Indexes.
close_reason: Audit complete: 5 flows measured, 7 findings ranked, EXPLAIN ANALYZE captured

title: Audit: Accessibility
description: Lighthouse. axe-core. Keyboard nav. Color contrast. ARIA.

title: Orientation: Architecture Assessment
close_reason: Architecture assessment complete — strengths, weaknesses, onboarding friction, 10x risks documented

title: Deliverable: Codebase Orientation Checklist
description: Final submission artifact — orientation checklist from appendix, bullet-by-bullet, in my voice. Due 3PM.
close_reason: Phase 0 orientation checklist submitted on time

title: Audit: Bundle Size
description: Production build size. Bundle viz. Largest chunks/deps. Unused deps. Code splitting.
close_reason: Bundle size audit complete — 2MB monolithic chunk documented with per-dep breakdown, 7 ranked findings, improvement ideas captured separately

title: Stretch: E2E Locator Brittleness Audit
description: Count fragile Playwright selectors (CSS classes, nth-child, text) vs stable ones (data-testid, role). Before/after metric on test resilience. Amplifies Category 5 (test quality).

title: Orientation: Deep Dive
description: Real-time collab, TS patterns, test infra, build/deploy.
close_reason: Deep Dive orientation complete — real-time collab, TS patterns, test infra, build/deploy documented in splainer-codebase-orientation.md

title: Phase 1: Audit Report
description: Baseline measurements for all 7 categories. Due Tuesday 11:59 PM.

title: Audit: Runtime Error Handling
description: Console, disconnect, malformed input, concurrent edits, throttle, server logs.

title: Stretch: Cyclomatic Complexity Analysis
description: Measure cyclomatic complexity across codebase. Identify hotspot functions. Lower priority — fixes risk looking cosmetic per assignment rules.

title: Phase 2: Implementation
description: Improvements across all 7 categories. Early Friday, final Sunday.

title: Audit: API Response Time
description: Seed DB. 5 endpoints. Benchmark 10/25/50 concurrency. P50/P95/P99.
close_reason: API response time audit complete — 5 endpoints benchmarked at 3 concurrency levels, 6 findings documented

title: Stretch: SQL Injection Audit
description: Audit all raw SQL queries for parameterization gaps. Government app with pg (no ORM) — find any un-parameterized user input. Maps to Category 6 (error handling). Even clean results are a strong documentation point.

title: Phase 0: Codebase Orientation
close_reason: Phase 0 orientation checklist submitted on time

title: Audit: Test Coverage & Quality
close_reason: Audit complete: 3x flaky detection (none), coverage measured, 13 stale web test failures documented

title: Orientation: First Contact
description: Repo overview, shared types, data model, request flow trace.
close_reason: First Contact orientation complete — repo overview, shared types, data model, request flow trace documented in notes/orientation-first-contact.md
